verses.text: The Levites are given cities with their suburbs. Levite cities. They dwell among all the tribes.
The Levites are given cities with their suburbs. Levite cities. They dwell among all the tribes.
The Levites are given cities with their suburbs. Levite cities. They dwell among all the tribes.
The Levites are given cities with their suburbs. Levite cities. They dwell among all the tribes.
The Levites are given cities with their suburbs. Levite cities. They dwell among all the tribes.
Forty-eight cities, including six of refuge, are theirs. Forty-eight. Their portion is scattered through Israel.
Forty-eight cities, including six of refuge, are theirs. Forty-eight. Their portion is scattered through Israel.
Forty-eight cities, including six of refuge, are theirs. Forty-eight. Their portion is scattered through Israel.
Six cities of refuge are appointed for the manslayer. Refuge. A place of safety is provided.
Six cities of refuge are appointed for the manslayer. Refuge. A place of safety is provided.
Six cities of refuge are appointed for the manslayer. Refuge. A place of safety is provided.
Six cities of refuge are appointed for the manslayer. Refuge. A place of safety is provided.
Three on each side of Jordan, open to all. For all. Even the stranger may flee there.
Three on each side of Jordan, open to all. For all. Even the stranger may flee there.
Three on each side of Jordan, open to all. For all. Even the stranger may flee there.
He that smites with iron, stone, or wood to death is a murderer. Murder. The weapon shows intent.
He that smites with iron, stone, or wood to death is a murderer. Murder. The weapon shows intent.
He that smites with iron, stone, or wood to death is a murderer. Murder. The weapon shows intent.
The avenger of blood may slay the murderer. Avenger. Bloodshed is requited.
The avenger of blood may slay the murderer. Avenger. Bloodshed is requited.
The avenger of blood may slay the murderer. Avenger. Bloodshed is requited.
The unintentional slayer flees to the city till the high priest dies. Refuge. Mercy shelters the innocent.
The unintentional slayer flees to the city till the high priest dies. Refuge. Mercy shelters the innocent.
The unintentional slayer flees to the city till the high priest dies. Refuge. Mercy shelters the innocent.
The unintentional slayer flees to the city till the high priest dies. Refuge. Mercy shelters the innocent.
If he leaves before the priest's death, the avenger may slay him. Stay. Safety is within the city.
If he leaves before the priest's death, the avenger may slay him. Stay. Safety is within the city.
If he leaves before the priest's death, the avenger may slay him. Stay. Safety is within the city.
A murderer is slain only on the word of witnesses. Witnesses. Justice requires proof.
A murderer is slain only on the word of witnesses. Witnesses. Justice requires proof.
No ransom for a murderer; blood defiles the land. No ransom. Bloodshed must be answered.
No ransom for a murderer; blood defiles the land. No ransom. Bloodshed must be answered.
